briefing.headline: Rig up a Neko Rig — steady winter approach for clear water.
briefing.gameplan:
The Neko Rig is a strong choice for winter with clear water and stable conditions.

KVD: In clear water, use dice/bug baits (Sexy Bug, Tumbleweed) on a Neko rig — incredible action and visibility. In stained water, stick to the traditional Neko worm for a subtler profile. Superglue the tungsten weights so they don't fly out when fish jump.

Key adjustment for stable: moderate cadence — match the natural pace of local forage.

primaryApproach.targets: Focus on point, rock, creek channel. Work the transitions and edges where structure changes.

alternateApproach.retrieve: Wheeler: Use a Neko rig around docks when primary offshore spots get pressured — dock fish are often less beat up and can save a tournament late in the day
alternateApproach.targets: Focus on point, rock, creek channel. Work the transitions and edges where structure changes.

proInsights.insight: KVD: In clear deep lakes with shad kills, fish often suspend. The higher they are in the water column, the more active they are. Fish off main lake points, humps, drops, centers of big bays — not near the bank. Alabama rig with spinners (keeps rig...

Yamamoto: The Chicken Rig is weedless unlike the Neko rig so it can be fished through brush, rocks, and docks. It has big bass appeal with the large Kut Tail profile. It's durable because the worm slides up the line on hookset

Wheeler: On highland reservoirs like Cherokee, smallmouth live around holes/depressions (20 ft around the side) — if rock is around them the smallies live there. If a rock vein goes into the middle, they live on those veins. The holes harbor the b...

briefing.depthStrategy: Stable winter conditions position bass at 15-35ft on main lake structure — bluffs, steep points, channel bends. Fish are lethargic and grouped tight. Vertical presentations directly on structure are essential.
adjustIf: If conditions suddenly shift (pressure drop, wind change), be ready to speed up your approach — transitional moments produce big bites
If water clarity decreases from wind or rain, upsize and switch to brighter colors
If you get followers without commits, add scent or downsize your hook/weight
